An Accounts & Audit Professional based between the Maldives and India

Detail-oriented and results-driven accounting professional with 5+ years of experience across hospitality, trading, and audit firm environments. Expertise spans Accounts Payable/Receivable, GST/MIRA compliance, payroll, statutory and internal audits, financial reporting, reconciliations, and month-end/year-end closing.

Known for accuracy, process discipline, and effective cross-functional coordination — with hands-on experience in hotel finance operations, cash management, and compliance across multi-property resort environments.

Core Competencies

What I Do

A practice built on disciplined reconciliation, compliant filings, and clean month-end closes.

01

AP & AR Operations

Invoice processing, PO/GRN three-way matching, payment runs, and full vendor & customer reconciliations.

02

GST / MIRA Compliance

GSTR-1, GSTR-3B filings, GSTR-2A/2B reconciliation, ITC validation, and mismatch resolution.

03

Statutory & Internal Audits

Ledger scrutiny, vouching, audit testing, and working papers under Indian GAAP.

04

Financial Reporting

Month-end / year-end closing, accruals, prepayments, and suspense account reconciliation.

05

Hotel Finance & PMS

Opera PMS guest folio reconciliation, OTA payment links, and USALI-compliant GL coding.

06

ERP & Systems

SunSystems (Infor), Sun Vision, Tally, Odoo, and QuickBooks across multi-entity operations.

Independent Project

FinanceFlow AI

An automated daily hotel income-audit workflow — built end-to-end as an independent project to cut audit turnaround from hours to minutes.

Pulls and parses PMS, POS, and Other Revenue data from Google Drive, applies the Claude API for AI-driven exception and variance analysis, runs reconciliation logic across revenue sources, and auto-generates & emails flash reports.
